activities_projects.title: Household Minerals Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify minerals used in daily life
steps: List at least ten objects in your home made from minerals
Identify the mineral used in each item
Write where these minerals are obtained from
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the importance of minerals in daily life

activities_projects.title: Minerals in Toothpaste Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Explore minerals used in common products
steps: Read the ingredients on a toothpaste label
Identify minerals such as silica or fluorite
Write their purpose in toothpaste

activities_projects.title: Mineral Definition Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the scientific definition of minerals
steps: Write the definition of a mineral
List three characteristics of minerals
Give examples of minerals found in rocks

activities_projects.title: Mineral Formation Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Learn the different modes of occurrence of minerals
steps: Draw diagrams showing minerals in veins, lodes and sedimentary layers
Label each formation clearly
Write one example mineral for each formation

activities_projects.title: Map Work – Mineral Distribution
activities_projects.objective: Locate major mineral producing areas in India
steps: Mark iron ore belts in India
Locate copper and bauxite producing regions
Label major mineral states

activities_projects.title: Mining Hazards Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand environmental and health impacts of mining
steps: List the problems faced by miners
Write environmental impacts of mining
Suggest two safety measures

activities_projects.title: Energy Sources Classification
activities_projects.objective: Differentiate between conventional and non-conventional energy
steps: List five conventional energy sources
List five non-conventional energy sources
Write two advantages of renewable energy

activities_projects.title: Coal Types Chart
steps: Write the names of four types of coal
Arrange them from lowest to highest carbon content
Draw a simple chart explaining each type

activities_projects.title: Renewable Energy Research
activities_projects.objective: Explore renewable energy sources in India
steps: Research solar, wind and biogas energy
Write how each source generates electricity
List one location in India where each is used

activities_projects.title: Energy Conservation Awareness Poster
steps: Design a poster encouraging energy conservation
Include slogans such as 'Energy saved is energy produced'
Display it in the classroom
